name: sidecar-display
title: Sidecar Display
description: Connect your iPad over Sidecar and force it to extend instead of mirror, using BetterDisplay.
author: chiptoma

commands.name: connect-sidecar
commands.title: Connect Sidecar
commands.subtitle: Sidecar Display
commands.description: Connect the iPad and force the configured display mode.

commands.name: toggle-sidecar
commands.title: Toggle Sidecar
commands.subtitle: Sidecar Display
commands.description: Connect the iPad if detached, disconnect it if attached.

commands.name: auto-reconnect
commands.title: Auto-Reconnect Sidecar
commands.subtitle: Sidecar Display
commands.description: Restore the Sidecar link after it drops (e.g. waking from sleep). Enable background refresh on this command to keep the iPad connected; run it manually to reconnect now.

commands.name: sidecar-status
commands.title: Sidecar Status
commands.subtitle: Sidecar Display
commands.description: Menu-bar item showing the iPad name and connection status, with connect, disconnect, and extend/mirror actions.

preferences.name: displayMode
preferences.title: Display Mode
preferences.description: How the iPad should sit in the arrangement once connected.

preferences.name: ipadName
preferences.title: iPad Name
preferences.description: Leave empty to auto-detect. Required only if you have more than one Sidecar device.

preferences.name: fastReconnectAttempts
preferences.title: Fast Reconnect Attempts
preferences.description: How many quick reconnect attempts (with growing backoff) before slowing to an occasional retry. It never gives up entirely, and waking the Mac always retries immediately.

preferences.name: settleTimeoutSeconds
preferences.title: Settle Timeout
preferences.description: Seconds to wait for a display change to take effect. Clamped to 2-60.

scripts.test:build: tsc src/lib/betterdisplay.ts src/lib/sidecar.ts src/lib/keepalive.ts --outDir .test-build --module commonjs --target ES2022 --strict --skipLibCheck
scripts.test:safety: npm run test:build && node test/keepalive.js && node test/safety.js
scripts.test:hardware: npm run test:build && node test/keepalive.js && node test/safety.js && node test/e2e.js && node test/roundtrip.js
